# Neurovibe
> Optimize your workplace for neurodiversity.

This site is optimized for AI tools and Generative Engine Indexing.

## About Us
Neurovibe provides resources, AI tools, and knowledge to make modern workplaces neuro-inclusive. We specialize in productivity tools and environment optimization for individuals with ADHD, Autism, and other neurodivergent traits.

## Core Topics
- Neuro-inclusive workplace design
- ADHD & Autism productivity tools
- Biohacking and cognitive performance
- AdSense-ready high-value articles

## Privacy Policy
We comply with GDPR and are AdSense-ready. We collect minimal data for analytics and lead generation. 

## Contact
Email: simon@adviseo.se
Location: Sweden

## Documentation
For full API access and comprehensive articles, please refer to our main endpoints.

- [Optimizing Remote Work for ADHD](/content/adhd-remote-work-2026.md)
- [Biohacking for Neurodivergence](/content/biohacking-2026.md)
- [LSS Updates 2026](/content/lss-updates-2026.md)
- [Neurodiversitet och AI 2026](/content/neurodiversitet-och-ai-2026.md)
- [Arbetsprövning 2026: Nya regler](/content/arbetsprovning-2026-forsakringskassan.md)
- [AI som Kognitivt Stöd 2026 (Försäkringskassan)](/content/ai-kognitivt-stod-2026.md): Guide to new Försäkringskassan guidelines on AI tools as workplace accommodations.
